title: rubus subcrenatus
intro: Rubus subcrenatus, also known as the lesser Himalayan raspberry, is a species of bramble that belongs to the Rubus genus. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus subcrenatus include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps, among other uses. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
